name: Eventually
title: Eventually by HTML5 UP
description: Ultra-minimal coming-soon / pre-launch landing page. Fullscreen dark background with a slowly panning and crossfading background image slideshow (multiple images cycle with CSS animation). Content is vertically centered: a large bold heading ('Eventually'), a two-line subtitle paragraph, and an inline email signup form with an email input field and 'Sign Up' button in teal/green. Below the form, a footer pinned to the bottom-left with a row of social media icon links (Twitter, Instagram, GitHub, Email) and a copyright line. No navigation, no sections, no scrolling — pure single-viewport experience. Preloader disables animations until page loads.

typography.style: Clean Roboto with bold headings, minimal text. Large heading size (3.25em) with subtle letter-spacing.

layoutDetails: Flexbox column layout, vertically centered content. Body uses flex with justify-content: center. Footer is absolutely positioned at bottom-left. Background images are fixed-position divs with cover sizing and CSS keyframe pan animation. No container width constraint.
visualStyle: Dark, cinematic, ultra-minimal. Slowly panning background image slideshow with low opacity (0.375). No cards, no borders, no sections. Just text, a form, and social icons on a dark canvas.

name: New Event
title: New Event - Responsive HTML Template
description: Event/conference single-page template with parallax sections and coral red (#f2545f) accent. Intro section with event branding. Overview and detail sections. Video section with embedded player. Speakers section with Owl Carousel (19 images). Program section with tabbed 3-day schedule. Registration form. Pricing section with ticket tiers. Sponsors section with logos. Contact section. Dark (#242424) backgrounds with parallax scrolling. Animate.css for entrance animations.

typography.style: Bold headings, high contrast on dark backgrounds

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid with parallax sections. Owl Carousel for speakers. Tabbed multi-day schedule. Registration form. Pricing cards. Sponsor logo grid. 10 parallax sections.
visualStyle: Dark, dramatic event aesthetic with coral red accents and parallax depth. Rich content with speakers carousel, tabbed schedule, and pricing tiers.

name: Eventre
title: Eventre - Event & Conference Html5 Template
description: Event and conference website with light theme and orange accent. Full-screen hero banner with dark overlay, event title, countdown timer, date/location info, and CTA buttons. Sticky navigation with multi-page menu (Home, Speakers, Pages, Schedule, Sponsors, News, Contact). About section with split layout. Speakers section with speaker cards showing photos, names, roles, and social links. Schedule section with 3-day tabbed content showing timed session entries. Registration form section. Pricing section with 3 plan cards. Ticket CTA section. Sponsors section with logo grid by tier. News/blog section. Subscribe section. Google Maps section. Footer with columns and social links.
layoutDetails: Bootstrap container grid, full-screen hero with countdown, tabbed schedule, sponsor tier grid, responsive with many breakpoints
visualStyle: Professional event/conference site with vibrant orange accents, countdown timer, speaker cards, tabbed schedule, and sponsor tiers

name: Artxibition
title: ArtXibition HTML Event Template
description: Event landing page for an art exhibition/festival. Features a sticky header navigation, hero section with event title and countdown timer (days/hours/minutes/seconds), email subscription form, and a prominent CTA button. Below the fold: event schedule with date/time listings, speaker/artist profiles with photos, an image gallery with lightbox, embedded Google Maps for venue location, and a YouTube video embed. Dark charcoal and white color scheme with subtle warm yellow accents. Owl Carousel for testimonials/gallery sliding. Fully responsive with mobile hamburger menu.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif (Poppins) throughout. Bold headings with uppercase transforms. Clean and contemporary event typography.

layoutDetails: Single-page scroll with alternating light/dark sections. Sticky top navigation. Full-width hero with countdown grid. Schedule uses timeline layout. Speaker cards in responsive grid. Gallery with filterable grid. Map section is full-width embed.
visualStyle: Professional event landing with dark charcoal sections alternating with white. Subtle pale yellow accents. Clean card-based layouts. Owl Carousel for dynamic content. Google Maps integration. Video lightbox.

name: Event Invitation
title: Event Invitation - Professional Portal
description: Event invitation/RSVP page with a refined, warm aesthetic and light/dark mode toggle. Centered layout with event details, countdown timer (days/hours/minutes/seconds), and an RSVP form with fields for first name, last name, email, phone, attendance status (radio buttons), number of guests, and dietary requirements. Light mode uses warm cream (#faf8f6) backgrounds; dark mode switches to dark brown (#1a1614). Work Sans font with thin weights for an elegant, editorial feel. Warm gold/copper (#957C62) accent color. No navigation or multiple sections. Single-purpose invitation page.

typography.style: Elegant thin-weight sans-serif (Work Sans 200-500). Light body weight for editorial feel. Outfit for accents. Warm and refined.

layoutDetails: Single-purpose fullscreen layout. Centered content with no navigation. Event details at top, countdown timer in middle, RSVP form below. Light/dark mode toggle button. No scrolling sections. Focused single-task design.
visualStyle: Refined and warm with copper/gold (#957C62) accent on cream backgrounds. Light/dark mode toggle. Countdown timer with elegant styling. RSVP form with radio buttons and dropdowns. Editorial thin-weight typography. Formal invitation aesthetic.

name: Fireworks Composer
title: Fireworks Composer - New Year 2026
description: Interactive New Year celebration landing page with a dark cinematic canvas and HTML5 Canvas fireworks animation. The page features a centered header with the title 'Fireworks Composer' in elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond) and an instruction to click anywhere to launch fireworks. Users interact by clicking the dark background to trigger colorful particle fireworks animations rendered on a full-screen canvas. The design uses a rich palette of burgundy, gold, champagne, and emerald tones against a deep charcoal-black background. Minimal content, purely experiential and interactive, focused on the fireworks visual effect.

typography.style: Elegant serif headings (Cormorant Garamond) paired with clean sans-serif body (Work Sans). Luxurious typographic contrast.

layoutDetails: Full-viewport canvas element covering the entire screen. Centered header overlay with title and instruction text. No scrolling content.
visualStyle: Dark cinematic celebration theme. Full-screen HTML5 Canvas with particle fireworks. Rich jewel-tone palette. Minimal UI, the animation IS the content.
